name: Kashier
description: Kashier — Egypt and MENA payment gateway supporting cards, wallets, and installments with hosted and API integration options.

seo.title: Kashier — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Kashier: Kashier — Egypt and MENA payment gateway supporting cards, wallets, and installments with hosted and API integration options.

when_to_use: Cards, Fawry, and wallet payment acceptance for Egyptian merchants
Hosted payment page and API integration for MENA e-commerce checkout
Installment payment options for Egypt and broader MENA online retail
Recurring billing via Kashier API for Egyptian subscription services

pros: Solid MENA coverage with installment support
cons: Smaller than regional giants like Fawry
Developer docs could be more thorough
Limited presence outside Egypt and MENA
review.verdict: Reasonable Egypt and MENA gateway for merchants wanting installments and hosted checkout without enterprise complexity.
review.best_for: Egypt and MENA e-commerce merchants needing local installments
review.not_for: Merchants outside MENA or those needing advanced analytics

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
